description: Spells channeling raw elemental forces - fire, ice, lightning, wind, and storm - into devastating displays of power.
abilities: Bedazzle
Four prismatic bolts sparkle toward any visible targets. When all four converge, cascading light overwhelms the senses, freezing the creature in mesmerized bewilderment.
Burn
Hot breath that curls into scorching winds around a creature. Uncomfortable at first. Overcharged, the target ignites in clinging flames that refuse to die.
Clap
Hands clap and a thunderous wave batters everything nearby. Anything smaller than a horse slams violently to the ground.
Cloudcall
Thick fog rolls outward from swirling hands, spilling around corners until impenetrable haze blankets the area. Nothing beyond arm's reach can be seen.
Fireball
A roaring sphere of flame hurled across the distance. They say a wizard's first fireball changes them. Not the power, but the silence after.
Freeze
Cool breath spiraling into freezing winds, chilling to the bone. At greater intensity, frost encases lesser foes in solid ice until the shell is shattered.
Gale
A ferocious wind stirred across any visible area. Blinding dust, knocked bodies, and helpless foes hurled through the howling air.
Kindle
Hands rubbed together to ignite any flammable object in sight. Cannot target creatures directly, but igniting something they wear singes them all the same.
Last Light
A blinding beam channeled through a pointed object, searing toward its target. Overloaded, it becomes a lance of pure annihilation. Deflectable by mirrors.
Magic Strike
A shimmering missile of force launched in a straight line through a pointed object. Overloaded, it strikes harder and homes unerringly on its target.
Nature's Wrath
Elemental fury channeled into a storm spanning the horizon. Lightning, hail, and hurricane winds rage as long as willed, draining the caster's vitality with every moment.
Riverfury
A whisper to a flowing river commands the waters to surge. A torrent crashes through, sweeping everything downstream and depositing battered victims on distant shores.
Scintillate
A streaking bolt of sparks toward a target. It explodes on contact with a satisfying crack, or bursts overhead as a dazzling firework in any shape desired.
Shock
Lightning called from sky or fingertips strikes a visible target in a deafening blast. Flesh sears. Worn metal turns white-hot.
Stormcall
Dark, charged clouds conjured overhead that answer on command. Downpours, deafening thunder, or chain lightning arcing vengefully from foe to foe.
Thunderous Word
A single word of power releases a shockwave, knocking back everything in its path. Ears ring. Senses scramble. Coherent response becomes impossible.
Vortex
A howling whirlpool in any body of liquid. Everything touching the water gets dragged in, spun through the depths, and spat out battered and half-drowned.
